offer: For accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, timesheet discrepancies cause inaccurate payroll, leading to client dissatisfaction. We provide reconciliation instead of manual processes.
problem: Inaccurate payroll due to timesheet discrepancies
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about payroll

try_it: Let users try manual entry for timesheets and reporting discrepancies
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
